steps.name: Given open noon website home page
When move to category option and choose samsung
And get filter by price and provide "maximumValue" and "minimumValue"
Then select filter by most recommended

labels.name: feature
labels.value: Filtering the results by price and recommendations

labels.name: suite
labels.value: Filtering the results by price and recommendations

labels.name: package
labels.value: src.test.java.Tests.FilterByPriceAndRecommendations.FilterByPriceAndRecommendations_feature.Filtering the results by price and recommendations
